regions.text: What is a circle? If you turn a straight line around one end like a watch hand, it covers a circle.
If you pull a line down a distance equal to its length, it makes a square. A square has equal sides and right angles.
A shape with equal sides but no right angles is not a square. A shape with right angles but unequal sides is not a square.
rest: the other parts. length: distance long.
